FLOW.COMMENT: this service needs to store these in a database

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: setContent - persist supplied content under the current transaction

INVOKE.COMMENT: Stream read %bytesread% - %sStreamlength% bytes persisted so far

Values.value: Stream read %bytesread% - %sStreamlength% bytes persisted so far

MAP.COMMENT: sStreamlength = length(fwcontentstring) see D100004376 for an example of why this won't work

INVOKE.COMMENT: FE0580 Unable to persist content - please specify fwcontent

Values.value: FE0580 Unable to persist content - please specify fwcontent

INVOKE.COMMENT: Stream complete - %sStreamlength% bytes accepted and persisted

Values.value: Stream complete - %sStreamlength% bytes accepted and persisted

INVOKE.NAME: false
INVOKE.COMMENT: FE0581 Internal error - unable to rename from %sFilenameBase%.writing to %sFilenameBase%.closed

Values.value: FE0581 Internal error - unable to rename from %sFilenameBase%.writing to %sFilenameBase%.closed

INVOKE.NAME: size != sStreamlength
INVOKE.COMMENT: FE0582 Internal error - unable to fully persist stream - expected %sStreamlength% bytes - found %size% bytes

Values.value: FE0582 Internal error - unable to fully persist stream - expected %sStreamlength% bytes - found %size% bytes

INVOKE.COMMENT: Persistence validated with size of %size% bytes, extract is:

Values.value: Persistence validated with size of %size% bytes, extract is: %sLeader%
